src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/ServerA.general_idea: Enable Spring's scheduling support to allow the use of @Scheduled annotations for background tasks.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6+ requirements for Java 21.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { ... @Bean public SecurityFilterChain configure(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/configu.general_idea: Switch from Firebase-specific pre-authentication components to a generic JWT request filter for authentication.
Explicitly configure CORS settings via a dedicated CorsFilter bean to replace implicit or legacy handling.
Introduce a PasswordEncoder bean using the delegating factory, likely required for new security features or compliance.
Enable method-level security annotations using the modern EnableMethodSecurity configuration.
Refactor HttpSecurity configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and AbstractHttpConfigurer for disabling features.
Migrate authorization rules from the old authorizeRequests() API to the new authorizeHttpRequests() API with lambda syntax.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.general_idea: Migrate the UserRepository from Spring Data JPA to jOOQ for database access.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/reposit.human_impl: Changed class from interface extending JpaRepository to class using DSLContext and Zkmf2024UserDao.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Remove Firebase Authentication dependency and replace with custom JWT-based authentication logic.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed FirebaseAuth imports and logic; added JwtService, PasswordEncoder, and custom login endpoint.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Implement a new login endpoint that validates credentials against the database and issues JWTs.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added POST /public/auth endpoint handling LoginRequestDTO and returning LoginResponseDTO with JWT.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Enable admin impersonation of users via a master password check during login.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added check for applicationProperties.getEncodedMasterPassword() to set impersonation flag in JWT.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace stub helper registration with actual service call and proper error handling.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Called helperRegistrationService.register() and used switch expression to return appropriate HTTP status.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace stub newsletter registration with actual service call and proper error handling.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Called newsletterService.register() and used switch expression to return appropriate HTTP status.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Update validation annotations from javax to jakarta namespace for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added import jakarta.validation.Valid and applied @Valid to request body parameters.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Replace manual Logger instantiation with Lombok @Slf4j annotation.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Removed static Logger field and LoggerFactory call; added @Slf4j annotation.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Rename DTO classes to follow standard naming conventions (ending in DTO).
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Changed imports from RegisterRequestDto to RegisterHelperRequestDTO, etc.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.general_idea: Inject new services required for authentication and registration logic.
src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/Au.human_impl: Added NewsletterService, HelperRegistrationService, JwtService, PasswordEncoder, and ApplicationProperties to constructor.

src/main/java/ch/zkmf2024/server/rest/se.general_idea: Replace domain entity import with a dedicated DTO import for UserRole.
Update user role retrieval to map from POJO role string to DTO enum instead of calling a method on the User entity.
Simplify the orElseThrow call by removing the explicit exception constructor, relying on the default NoSuchElementException.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper JAR to version 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Upgrade the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.6 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and modern plugin features.

.run/ServerApplication.run.xml.general_idea: Configure the IDE run configuration to explicitly use Java 21 as the execution runtime.

mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 0.5.6 to 3.2.0 to align with modern Maven standards.
mvnw.human_impl: Changed header comment to 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0' and updated download URLs to point to org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/3.2.0.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace deprecated backtick command substitution with modern $() syntax for better readability and nesting support.
mvnw.human_impl: Replaced instances of `command` with $(command) throughout the script, e.g., `uname` to $(uname).

mvnw.general_idea: Remove reliance on the deprecated M2_HOME environment variable, as modern Maven wrappers do not require a pre-installed Maven distribution.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed logic that resolved M2_HOME from symlinks and removed -Dmaven.home from the final exec command.

mvnw.general_idea: Introduce SHA-256 checksum validation for the downloaded maven-wrapper.jar to ensure integrity and security.
mvnw.human_impl: Added logic to read wrapperSha256Sum from properties and verify the jar using sha256sum or shasum before execution.

mvnw.general_idea: Enhance robustness by adding error checks for directory changes and command availability.
mvnw.human_impl: Added '|| exit 1' to cd commands and improved fallback logic for downloading the wrapper jar.

mvnw.general_idea: Fix issues with Windows line endings (CRLF) when reading configuration files in Git Bash environments.
mvnw.human_impl: Added tr -d '\r' when reading wrapperUrl and tr -s '\r\n' ' ' in concat_lines to strip carriage returns.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper JAR download URL to use the official Apache Maven group ID instead of the legacy Takari group ID.
Centralize and improve logging output for debugging wrapper initialization steps.
mvnw.human_impl: Introduced a log() function that prints messages only if MVNW_VERBOSE is true, replacing scattered echo statements.

mvnw.general_idea: Correctly pass command-line arguments to the Maven process by using $* instead of $@ in MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS.
Allow passing additional debug options to the JVM via MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS.
mvnw.human_impl: Added $MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the final exec command arguments.
